summary: Founded and lead a specialist sustainable marketing and communications agency helping organisations across the space, technology, and mission-driven sectors strengthen brand strategy, digital visibility, and audience engagement. Green Orbit Digital combines SEO, content strategy, analytics, and low-carbon web thinking to support measurable growth and responsible marketing.
responsibilities: Develop marketing, communications, and PR strategies for organisations operating across the space and Earth observation sectors.
Deliver sustainable marketing programmes aligned with environmental best practice and Carbon Literacy principles.
Lead client relationships, budgets, and multidisciplinary project delivery.
Produce campaigns that improve visibility, engagement, and lead generation.
Shape SEO, content, and digital strategy for mission-driven organisations.
achievements: Founded Green Orbit Digital.
Established a specialist sustainable marketing consultancy for the global space sector.
Built a brand focused on data-driven growth, sustainability, and technical storytelling.

summary: Dedicated time to professional development following a personal bereavement, using the period to strengthen expertise in marketing, science communication, and digital communications. Completed specialist training and professional accreditation to support continued growth in strategic communications and science-focused content work.
responsibilities: Achieved Chartered Marketer (CMktr) accreditation.
Completed Applied Science Communication: Online and Media Writing.
Completed professional development courses in digital marketing and communications.
achievements: Awarded Chartered Marketer status.
Expanded professional capability across science communication and digital marketing.

organisation: HE Space for European Space Agency
summary: Managed marketing, editorial, and stakeholder communications supporting ESA Business Applications and Space Solutions. Worked across content production, webinar delivery, outreach, and event communications to help promote funding calls, engage stakeholders, and strengthen visibility across the ESA business applications ecosystem.
responsibilities: Produced editorial content for ESA Business Applications communications.
Managed webinars, outreach campaigns, and stakeholder events.

Supported funding call promotion and community engagement.
Helped translate technical and programme information into clear public-facing communications.
achievements: Delivered communications support for a high-profile European space programme environment.
Helped maintain consistent editorial and stakeholder messaging across multiple channels.

summary: Delivered editorial, social media, training, and communications projects for academic institutions, commercial organisations, and European space programmes. responsibilities: Developed communications strategies for space-sector organisations.

Supported conferences, outreach activities, and stakeholder engagement.

achievements: Delivered consultancy work across multiple sectors and international contexts.

summary: Co-founded an international network supporting space communicators through collaboration, events, and professional development. Helped build a community platform that connected practitioners, encouraged knowledge-sharing, and supported sector-wide communications growth.
responsibilities: Established strategic partnerships across the international space community.
Developed workshops, webinars, and networking events.
Managed communications, governance, and organisational development.

achievements: Co-founded the Powering Space network.

summary: Co-founded a space sector outreach and training company focused on developing engagement programmes, events, and skills development initiatives. Contributed to the design and delivery of education-led activities that supported wider public engagement with space and STEM subjects.
responsibilities: Designed and delivered space-focused education and outreach programmes.
Coordinated workshops, training sessions, and events.
Managed partnerships and collaborator relationships.
Developed educational activity that supported public understanding of space science and engineering.
achievements: Established R&R Space Ltd as a space-sector outreach initiative.
Built experience in programme delivery, partnership development, and event-based learning.

summary: Led editorial production and multimedia storytelling for space-related publications, including video scripts, interviews, and digital content. responsibilities: Produced editorial content and video scripts for ESA-related and diplomatic interview series.

achievements: Delivered high-quality editorial and multimedia content for space-sector communications.

summary: Delivered STEM outreach programmes and educational content supporting engineering communication and public engagement initiatives. Contributed to school workshops, learning resources, and outreach activity designed to inspire interest in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
responsibilities: Created educational resources for the BLAST learning platform.

Supported public engagement activities related to high-speed engineering projects.
